gallagher.blurb: Icomply installs and services Gallagher access control across Stockport, Manchester and the wider North West — card, fob and biometric readers with site-wide controller programming for commercial estates and multi-site FM. Our engineers handle commissioning, certificate packs and reactive call-outs, while the trade shop stocks Gallagher reader modules, tokens and power supplies for landlords and contractors who need next-day spares.

garo.blurb: Icomply is a North West electrical contractor for Garo consumer units, EV charge points and distribution boards — BS 7671 installation, EICR support and planned maintenance for homes, landlords and commercial sites. From Stockport and Manchester to Cheshire and Lancashire, we commission Garo equipment with full certification and keep trade-ready breakers, enclosures and EV accessories on the shelf for engineers on the road.

gent.blurb: Icomply designs, installs and maintains Gent fire alarm systems to BS 5839 for offices, industrial units and multi-occupancy buildings across Greater Manchester and the North West. Whether you need a new addressable panel, detector loop extensions or annual certification, our fire engineers deliver compliant commissioning and keep Gent call points, sounders and detector heads available through the trade counter for FM teams and contractors.

geze.blurb: Icomply supplies and installs Geze AOV and smoke-control actuators for stairwells, atria and commercial façades throughout Stockport, Manchester and the North West. Our team programmes control panels to BS 9991 / EN 12101, carries out periodic service visits and provides certificate evidence for building control and insurers. Trade customers can order Geze actuator spares, brackets and control-panel consumables direct from our shop.

givenergy.blurb: Icomply installs GivEnergy battery storage and hybrid inverter systems for homes and light commercial sites across the North West — full design, BS 7671 electrical integration and commissioning with clear handover packs. From Stockport to Manchester and into Cheshire, we service existing GivEnergy setups, diagnose inverter faults and stock trade cables, CT clamps and battery accessories so installers can keep projects moving.

gjd.blurb: Icomply fits and maintains GJD external detectors and perimeter alarm devices for commercial yards, depots and residential sites across Greater Manchester and the North West. Our intruder-alarm engineers programme GJD PIRs and beam sets to PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 standards, issue certification and respond to fault call-outs. The trade shop carries GJD detector heads, brackets and power modules for contractors who need reliable outdoor detection spares.
